generated_exposure.exposure_text: I get why people worry about privacy, but have you seen what happens when agencies can't act fast? My neighbor's kid was targeted by a predator last year. Local police were handcuffed by red tape while federal agents couldn't intervene because of outdated laws. We need to update these tools so good people can protect our communities. #ModernizeSecurity #CommunityFirst
